title: Earnings call transcript: Marathon Digital's Q2 2025 record revenue
text: Marathon Digital Q2 2025 earnings call transcript discussing record revenue and stock volatility. The company reported record second-quarter revenue of $238.5 million, a 64% increase year-over-year. Net income reached $808.2 million, or $1.84 per share, a dramatic improvement from a $200 million loss in Q2 2024. Bitcoin holdings reached 49,951 BTC, up 170% from 18,488 BTC at the end of Q2 2024, making MARA the second-largest corporate Bitcoin holder. The market value of Bitcoin holdings increased by more than $4.2 billion. Purchased energy costs per Bitcoin were $33,735, among the lowest in the sector. Energized hashrate grew to 57.4 exahashes per second, an 82% increase from 31.5 EH/s a year ago. The company held over $5 billion in liquid assets. The stock faced volatility despite strong operational metrics.
